languages.text: {n}Ведка задумчиво смотрит на свой протез.{/n} "Валанциусский дар... Простите за потраченное время, Лорд-капитан. Я должна была сразу же сделать столь очевидный выбор".
{n}Vedka looks thoughtfully at her prosthesis.{/n} "The von Valancius gift... Forgive me for wasting your time, Lord Captain. I should have made such an obvious choice right from the start."
languages.original_text: {n}Ведка задумчиво смотрит на свой протез.{/n} "Валанциусский дар... Простите за потраченное время, Лорд-капитан. Я должна была сразу же сделать столь очевидный выбор".

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka looks thoughtfully at her prosthesis.{/n} "The von Valancius gift... Forgive me for wasting your time, Lord Captain. I should have made such an obvious choice right from the start."
{n}Vedka looks thoughtfully at her prosthesis.{/n} "The von Valancius gift... Forgive me for wasting your time, Lord Captain. I should have made such an obvious choice right from the start."
"Of course! Why didn't I think of that myself? Augmetics and supplies will allow us to serve you much better."
{n}Vedka looks thoughtfully at her prosthesis.{/n} "The von Valancius gift... Forgive me for wasting your time, Lord Captain. I should have made such an obvious choice right from the start."
{n}Vedka looks thoughtfully at her prosthesis.{/n} "The von Valancius gift... Forgive me for wasting your time, Lord Captain. I should have made such an obvious choice right from the start."

languages.text: 「もちろん！なぜ私が自分で思いつかなかったんだろう。拡張機能と用品があれば、もっとお役に立てるわ。」
languages.original_text: "Of course! Why didn't I think of that myself? Augmetics and supplies will allow us to serve you much better."

languages.text: {n}Vedka, düşünceli bir şekilde protezine bakıyor.{/n} "Von Valancius armağanı... Zamanınızı boşa harcadığım için beni bağışlayın Lord Kaptan. Böyle bariz bir seçimi daha en başından yapmalıydım."
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka looks thoughtfully at her prosthesis.{/n} "The von Valancius gift... Forgive me for wasting your time, Lord Captain. I should have made such an obvious choice right from the start."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka, düşünceli bir şekilde protezine bakıyor.{/n} "Von Valancius armağanı... Zamanınızı boşa harcadığım için beni bağışlayın Lord Kaptan. Böyle bariz bir seçimi daha en başından yapmalıydım."

languages.text: {n}薇德卡若有所思地看着她的义体。{/n}“冯·瓦兰修斯的馈赠……请原谅我浪费了您的时间，舰长大人。如此显而易见的选择，我从一开始就不该犹豫。”
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka looks thoughtfully at her prosthesis.{/n} "The von Valancius gift... Forgive me for wasting your time, Lord Captain. I should have made such an obvious choice right from the start."

traits.locale_text: {n}薇德卡若有所思地看着她的义体。{/n}“冯·瓦兰修斯的馈赠……请原谅我浪费了您的时间，舰长大人。如此显而易见的选择，我从一开始就不该犹豫。”

languages.text: {n}Vedka blickt nachdenklich auf ihre Prothese.{/n} "Die Gabe von Valancius ... Verzeiht mir, dass ich Eure Zeit stehle, Lord Captain. Ich hätte diese offensichtliche Entscheidung sofort treffen sollen."
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka looks thoughtfully at her prosthesis.{/n} "The von Valancius gift... Forgive me for wasting your time, Lord Captain. I should have made such an obvious choice right from the start."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka blickt nachdenklich auf ihre Prothese.{/n} "Die Gabe von Valancius ... Verzeiht mir, dass ich Eure Zeit stehle, Lord Captain. Ich hätte diese offensichtliche Entscheidung sofort treffen sollen."

languages.text: {n}Vedka inspecte pensivement sa prothèse.{/n} « Le cadeau des von Valancius... Je vous ai fait perdre votre temps, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je m'en excuse. Ce choix était une évidence, j'aurais dû le voir plus tôt. »
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka looks thoughtfully at her prosthesis.{/n} "The von Valancius gift... Forgive me for wasting your time, Lord Captain. I should have made such an obvious choice right from the start."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka inspecte pensivement sa prothèse.{/n} « Le cadeau des von Valancius... Je vous ai fait perdre votre temps, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je m'en excuse. Ce choix était une évidence, j'aurais dû le voir plus tôt. »

languages.text: {n}Vedka mira pensativamente a su prótesis.{/n} «El don de los von Valancius... Mis disculpas por hacerle perder el tiempo, Lord Capitán. Debería haber tomado una decisión tan evidente desde el principio».
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka looks thoughtfully at her prosthesis.{/n} "The von Valancius gift... Forgive me for wasting your time, Lord Captain. I should have made such an obvious choice right from the start."
